name: TCIL_RequestVersion
title: TCIL_RequestVersion
syntax: long TCIL_RequestVersion(dbNode tc, dbNode client); // form 3
long TCIL_RequestVersion(dbNode tc, dword addressClient); // form 4
description: This function requests the Version message from the client.

parameters.name: tc
parameters.description: Task Controller simulation node to apply the function.

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: Task Controller client node the TC sends the Request Version to.

parameters.name: addressClient
parameters.description: Address of the Task Controller client node the TC sends the Request Version to.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
